news.t: ‘Crash proof' your portfolio with these 10 stocks and 3 ETFs
Swan Global Investments Hedged Equity ETF Eclipses $75mm AUM
Swan Global Investments Launches Hedged Equity ETF to Help More Investors Manage Risk and Optimally Structure Their Portfolios

holdings.infoBox: HEGD is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings. The top holdings are State Street® SPDR® S&P 500® ETF stock at 91.65%, SPX US 12/17/27 P7300 at 7.88%, SPX US 12/17/27 P7400 at 6.98%, Put On S&P 500 Dec26 at 4.43%, and SPX US 12/17/27 C7500 at 4.15%.

overview.description: The Swan Hedged Equity US Large Cap ETF (HEGD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that provides hedged exposure to US large-cap companies using ETFs and options. HEGD was launched on Dec 22, 2020 and is issued by Swan.

data.title: ‘Crash proof' your portfolio with these 10 stocks and 3 ETFs
data.text: You don't get upset for having homeowner's insurance but your house doesn't burn down. The same principle should apply to investors who insure their stock portfolios against a crash.
